item.title: Void inspection in manufacturing with AXI: everything you need to know.
item.description: Discover how Multi Line AXI reliably detects voids in 3D volumes, identifies defects at an early stage and makes your production more efficient and secure. State-of-the-art AXI technology for maximum quality in electronics production!

item.title: From voids to head-in-pillow: reliably detecting BGA defects with AXI
item.description: Inspect BGAs reliably in line with the production cycle: Experience how Multi Line AXI tests BGAs in 3D volume, automatically detects voids, head-in-pillow and short circuits, thereby reducing scrap – for stable processes and maximum manufacturing quality.

item.title: Altus and Koh Young to Host Webinar Showcasing AI Applications in Inspection Software - What's New in Electronics
item.description: Altus Group, a distributor of capital equipment for the electronics manufacturing industry in the UK and Ireland, and Koh Young Technology, a global provider of True 3D measurement-based inspection systems, will host a technical webinar on 28 April 2026 showcasing how artificial intelligence (AI) is being applied within inspection software to improve process control and [...]

item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar - AeroMegh
item.description: Join this exclusive webinar to discover how AeroMegh's advanced GeoAI platform and AI-powered drone technology automatically identify corrosion, damaged insulators, and structural defects with 95%+ accuracy. Learn practical implementation strategies to predict equipment failures and enhance grid reliability.

item.title: Webinar Kistler: Advanced sensors & software for smarter manufacturing & process monitoring
item.description: This webinar explores how intelligent, application-specific sensors and software deliver real-time process visibility, enabling early defect detection, minimizing rework, and improving overall equipment effectiveness (OEE).

item.title: PCB Defect Detection: Computer Vision with Raspberry Pi - Elektor Magazine
item.description: Machine learning enables real-time PCB defect detection using a FOMO model on a Raspberry Pi. Learn how with this straightforward approach.

item.title: AI Transforming NDT through Automated Defect Recognition
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs.
